reviews.review_description: I don't want anything in my VR system with someone associated with Jeffrey  Epstein

So guided meditation with a cute little island you build sounds like fun.  What what do I do with the f…..nut I won? Tried e dry button to plant it or at least stop it moving DIRECTLY IN FRONT OF MY FIELD OF VISION…but nope, there it is not matter where I teleport and I don’t see a dialogue box telling me how to plant it. ( no I don’t recall how I did the first plant, you tell me).
Also I have an ongoing issue with designers fascination with everything taking place IN THE BLASTED AIR! I really thought an island based construction would avoid triggering my acrophobia,  it the meditation feels like I suspended upon the air and endlessly falling.

Pretty, fun graphics, cute avatar, and a concept i wanted to love. 
Pass.
For some reason I can't make it pass the login page, it just freezes when it asks if we have an account or not. . so I cannot use it.

I like the concept and range of meditation themes, but the graphics are too pixelated and ruins the immersion. I end up closing my eyes during the meditations which at that point I might as well listen to a free YouTube video. Sorry but until this is fixed I have to stick with Realms of Flow

The game is very cute and I like hanging out with my buddy. But the meditation only has one visual to look at which doesn't utilize the potential of VR. It's just a bunch of Kaleidoscope colors which is nice but I'd like to be on mountain tops or alien planets. Hear birds and see beautiful places I can't travel too. It would also be nice to bring my buddy there too. So it's cute but limited.

I had good hopes for this app when I first booted it up, but I found navigating the unnecessary and redundant island and selecting a session so frustratingly difficult to achieve, it completely undid any of the positive effects of the session. Removing this aspect and replacing it with a simple menu would be better, but even then I found the sessions themselves lacking. They all seemed to involve staring at the same vortex, which lost its novelty after the first session. Or even worse, some sessions appeared to have no visual aspect at all. When one of the sessions then appeared to be instructing the user to hyperventilate, I completely lost interest.

This feels like an audio app, with a badly implemented visual interface tacked on.

reviews.review_title: Great app, I Use it everyday and love it
reviews.review_description: Thank You so much, for this great app! I use this everyday and I really feel a difference. They provide a nice variety of very helpful meditations and 7 day programs, that really make a difference!

developer_response.body: Hey there! Apologies for those glitches and thank you so much for the kind review. If you could please reach out to our support team at hello@playmaloka.com, they will be able to help investigate those bugs. 🙏

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this, so many different meditation types. A relaxing little island. My only gripe is that I really prefer the sound meditation the most and I almost fall asleep only to be shocked out of the zone by the speaker coming back in and welcoming you back. Other than that it is a great game with lots of options to try to see which type of meditation you like. The pace at which the game gives you new options I think is perfect, doesn't overwhelm.

developer_response.body: Hi there! So glad to hear you are loving Maloka! Thank you so much for this helpful feedback on the sound meditations and for taking the time to leave a review.

reviews.review_description:
Honestly this was a beautiful ten minutes.  Bummer,  it was basically an advertisement for a mobile app that you have to download to your phone before you can actually play the app downloaded to your VR.
Thanks but no thanks.
Next

developer_response.body: Hi Charlee, thank you for taking the time to leave a review and offer this feedback! We're sorry that the mobile companion app wasn't the most convenient setup for you. We appreciate the feedback and hope you might give Maloka another try down the line :)

reviews.review_title: Love it but longer meditations need work
reviews.review_description:
The best mondfulness/meditation app with a really cool inner world concept. The vortex is an amazing way to meditate. My only piece of constructive criticism is around the meat of the app, which is the vortex. When you want to meditate for longer than 5 minutes, the vortex simply stitches several 5min vortexes together. IMO it takes away from the loss of sense of time you could experience. When you hear the first vortex segment wind down and the music stop, it takes you out of the mindful meditative space and you're reminded that "OK, just completed a 5min segment, have X segments to go". Maybe instead for longer meditations if the stitching would cut the intro/outro of the segment for the middle portions, it would be a lot more immersive. Keep the intro for the overall intro and the outro for the overall outro. 

Edit: Also having even slower breathing options would be great for those of us who like to breathe even deeper a d slower than the slowest option now. 

Thanks for an amazing product!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to leave a review! We greatly appreciate the feedback. 

Please note, we have recently added the option to slow your breathing rate -- in the Vortex portal, behind the different stones you will see 2 pillars which contain the options to adjust. :)

Hope you continue to enjoy and thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I wish this app worked better. I did the tutorial and liked it enough to follow their prompts of creating a separate account and downloading a companion app for the phone. However the app fails to send the verification email. I've tested multiple email accounts over the last week and none are received. When I log back into the game all I can do is repeat the tutorial, I can't continue to make my own space. Absolutely a fail.

developer_response.body: Hello there -- thank you for taking the time to leave a review and we are so sorry for the bumpy start. If you are able to email maloka@galaxylabs.io, we'd love to help get that verification email over to you. Thank you again!

reviews.review_description:
A calming game with lots of creativity and has a unique spin on it that I haven't seen in any other meditation softwares.
The added details (creating your garden) is fun but it kind of draws away from the peacefulness and simplicity of the game. It promotes mindfulness, but I think there should be a way to skip it.
I am sure that this is more my problem, but I don't like how I have to sign up to continue after the first session. I wish that there was a way to just play as a guest or something similar.
It is still a wonderful game in the end, and I would still recommend it.

developer_response.body: Hi there -- thank you for taking the time to leave a review and offer this feedback! We greatly appreciate it and hope you continue to enjoy. :)

reviews.review_description: Such a tranquil, beautiful and non gimmicky way to meditate on the Oculus! The ability to personalise your island and gain access to different types of meditations as a reward is a brilliant way to encourage consistent use. The addition of a spirit guide is an adorable idea too. The meditations themselves are engaging without being distracting or overly busy, and the voice of the woman doing the guidance within them is very soothing. Basically I couldn’t praise Maloka more, I’ve tried many meditation apps for the Oculus and truly believe this is the one with the most potential. Very excited to see how it will evolve!

developer_response.body: Ahh, thank you so much for such a lovely review!! We are so grateful to know that you are enjoying Maloka. 💖

reviews.review_description: Really enjoying this app so far thank you. Would it be possible to have a setting that allows you to use this app laying down? The right stick adjusts the position of the rings horizontally if it could also adjust on the vertical axis that would be great. Thanks.

developer_response.body: Hey there -- thank you for taking the time to leave a review and offer feedback! We greatly appreciate it. Please stay tuned and keep an eye out for that Recline Option as we continue to roll out updates 😊

reviews.review_description: I look forward to getting in my VR and escaping to my personal island. I love the sound meditation and the beautiful kaleidoscope meditation. Love having my own island watching my spirit guide creature grow as I do meditations. This is a must have!!

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We hope you are continuing to enjoy your time on your island! 💙

reviews.review_description: I like I it, but when I'm sitting still while meditating, I'll see a black screen (standby?!) after a few minutes. So I have to push the power button from time to time, which is interrupting my meditation.

developer_response.body:
Hi Gianni, thank you for taking time to leave a review! We are glad you're enjoying and hope the below settings adjustments will help with the Standby:

Adjust Oculus Sleep Settings: 
Quick Setting (where the clock is shown on your menu bar) > Settings (gear icon)> Device>Power (select longer than 15 seconds, which is default)

Please let us know if not (maloka@galaxylabs.io) and will be happy to help troubleshoot!

reviews.review_description: I love Maloka. It's absolutely amazing! It is like going on a spiritual expedition with lots of wonderful and healing experiences. It really saved my health during these stressful times ❤️🙏

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review and share. 💖 We're deeply grateful you've found Maloka to be helpful and hope you are continuing to enjoy the expedition 😛

reviews.review_description: I can’t creat an account nor do anything! I did try to set up an account on my phone then log in and nothing still waiting to confirm my email which was 2 hrs ago! Don’t get this app!

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you very much for taking the time to leave a review. We are so sorry for the frustrating set up! Would love to help get this sorted if you're still interested. 🙏 

Could you please send a message containing the email you used to sign up to maloka@galaxylabs.io? Our apologies again and we hope to hear from you!

reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying this app it is really peaceful and relaxing I use it daily.  It helps with my meditation

developer_response.body: We're so glad you've found Maloka to be helpful. :) Thanks so much for the review!!

reviews.review_description:
I agree with the comment that this is the best app for mindfulness. 

This game/app seems to get me to focus more on my breath and being present so my mind does not wander to other places as much and that is usually my biggest challenge.

I like the sound meditation and also the breath meditation where I zone out on the expanding and contracting colors that sync with my breath.

I wear a Fitbit which tracks my heart rate and noticed that the meditation lowers my heart rate significantly.

developer_response.body: Ah, we are so happy to hear this! Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and we hope you continue to find benefit in Maloka. :)
